allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Initialize HomeRadar project with RSS collector

- Set up project structure following WineRadar pattern
- Implement RSS collector for real estate news sources
- Add comprehensive test suite (10 unit tests, all passing)
- Configure 15 data sources (3 enabled, tested successfully)
- Create demo script to validate RSS collection

Key components:
- collectors/: BaseCollector, RSSCollector, CollectorRegistry
- config/sources.yaml: 15 data sources across 3 tiers
- tests/: Unit and integration tests with 80.95% coverage
- docs/: DATA_SOURCES.md with detailed source documentation

Data sources:
- T1: MOLIT APIs (ready), Korea.kr RSS feeds (working)
- T2: Korean news RSS (Hankyung, Herald, Chosun)
- T3: Market platforms (planned)

Verified with live feeds:
- Korea Economic Daily: 50 articles
- Korea Gov Policy: 50 articles
- Korea Gov Economy: 42 articles

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement DuckDB graph store with query APIs

- Create GraphStore class for DuckDB-based storage
- Implement schema for URLs, entities, and transactions
- Add query methods for views and searches
- Write comprehensive test suite (16 unit tests, all passing)
- Create full pipeline demo (RSS → Storage → Query)

Key components:
- graph/graph_store.py: DuckDB storage with CRUD operations
- graph/graph_queries.py: High-level query APIs (views, search)
- tests/unit/test_graph_store.py: 96.74% coverage
- demo_pipeline.py: Full integration demo

Features:
- Store RSS news items with metadata
- Entity relationship management
- Regional/source/keyword queries
- Statistics and analytics
- Automatic indexing for performance

Tested with live data:
- 142 items collected from 3 RSS sources
- Successfully stored and queried
- Database: data/homeradar.duckdb (~100KB)

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
